author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.3.0
body: # [5.3.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.2.3...v5.3.0) (2018-09-24) ### Bug Fixes * **SSR:** bind getSearchParmaters to the component instance ([dfd95f0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/dfd95f0)) * **GoogleMapsLoader:** pick google maps version ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1540](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1540)) ([316acd8](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/316acd8)) ### Features * **connectToggleRefinement:** implement canRefine & count ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1588](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1588)) ([f3a1f45](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f3a1f45))
